Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 316}These classrooms are also used for club activities, not just for lessons.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 316}Typically, it's the culture clubs that use them, but they don't seem to be accepting new members right now.[n]{f 1 1}
